title: I got my Evangelion 101 DVD
wikitext:
[]: I got my Evangelion 1.01 DVD!             Quote Post by Evangelion » Sat Nov 07, 2009 11:04 pm Its shiny.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Nov 07, 2009 11:19 pm Awesome! So the inside has images of Rei and Shinji from the original Japanese DVD covers, right? Are they reversible so you can display it through the DVD case? I really really hope Funi will release 1.11 as supposedly mentioned, I've got to own that! ><

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Nov 07, 2009 11:27 pm It's not out yet, you hacker.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion » Sat Nov 07, 2009 11:51 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Awesome! So the inside has images of Rei and Shinji from the original Japanese DVD covers, right? Are they reversible so you can display it through the DVD case? I really really hope Funi will release 1.11 as supposedly mentioned, I've got to own that! ><

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Sun Nov 08, 2009 10:12 am Coolness.... Did you get this in a store, or as a pre-order on Amazon or somesuch? I'm getting extremely itchy waiting for Nov. 17 and I've been wondering (read "hoping") if some places are doing "soft" releases, ie. putting it on the shelf before the official release date (I've had this happen with soon to be released books).

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion » Sun Nov 08, 2009 4:07 pm MatrixRefugee wrote: Coolness.... Did you get this in a store, or as a pre-order on Amazon or somesuch? I'm getting extremely itchy waiting for Nov. 17 and I've been wondering (read "hoping") if some places are doing "soft" releases, ie. putting it on the shelf before the official release date (I've had this happen with soon to be released books).

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sun Nov 08, 2009 5:25 pm The dvd cover looks awesome, I can't wait to get my copy soon. It's not out yet, you hacker.

[]:             Quote Post by icomeanon4 » Sun Nov 08, 2009 6:40 pm My big question is if the darkness issue is still present. If it is, I'm definitely waiting for 1.11.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion » Sun Nov 08, 2009 7:36 pm icomeanon4 wrote: My big question is if the darkness issue is still present. If it is, I'm definitely waiting for 1.11.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sun Nov 08, 2009 8:27 pm So any DVD extars? I know their might not be much but anything trailers or what?

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion » Sun Nov 08, 2009 8:47 pm Guyver Spawn wrote: So any DVD extars? I know their might not be much but anything trailers or what?

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Sun Nov 08, 2009 9:07 pm lol the GIANT ROBOT series.....they really understand their product.....*fail* No extra at all ? like the making off included in the Japanese version (making off might be misleading, i mean showing scenes from drawing to final version, or cg process)

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Sun Nov 08, 2009 9:22 pm geh!! that's going to be on my shelf pretty soon.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Nov 08, 2009 9:57 pm Ugh it doesn't even have ANY of the Japanese trailers on it? Lame. I'm definitely holding out for 1.11 then.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Sun Nov 08, 2009 10:26 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Ugh it doesn't even have ANY of the Japanese trailers on it? Lame. I'm definitely holding out for 1.11 then.

[]:             Quote Post by Heromaster111 » Sun Nov 08, 2009 10:43 pm I'll probably get this. Is it a waste of money, in all likelihood yes, but i got some money that I can burn and 15-20 dollars isn't that big a price anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by icomeanon4 » Sun Nov 08, 2009 11:09 pm MatrixRefugee wrote: Aww -.- I might do the same... But I wanna see Rebuild 1.0 so badly. :: Cries:: It's gonna be my reward for getting halfway through my NaNo novel... Decisions, decisions...

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Sun Nov 08, 2009 11:26 pm icomeanon4 wrote: MatrixRefugee wrote: Aww -.- I might do the same... But I wanna see Rebuild 1.0 so badly. :: Cries:: It's gonna be my reward for getting halfway through my NaNo novel... Decisions, decisions...

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sun Nov 08, 2009 11:43 pm I'll probably get this since I really enjoy it when I saw it back in March and I can it again not a small screen. Once 1.11 comes out then I will sell this one and buy 1.11 with the money that I got when selling it.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Mon Nov 09, 2009 1:54 am I can try to rent this, then buy 1.11 when its released next year
